predictions.text: CONGRATULATIONS WINNER!!! You WON a FREE cash PRIZE! Claim your $$$ at http://bit.ly/claim-now and http://win-big.io NOW! Offer expires TODAY, act now, LIMITED time only! HURRY!!

Hi team, following up on yesterday's planning meeting. We agreed to move the database migration to next sprint so that the reporting work can finish first. Sarah will update the timeline document and share it before Friday. Please review the updated estimates when you get a chance and add any concerns as comments. The staging environment will be unavailable on Thursday morning while operations applies security patches. Thanks everyone for the productive discussion, and let me know if anything important is missing from the notes.
Thanks! See you at the meeting at 3pm.

Dear customer, we detected unusual activity on your account. To avoid suspension, please verify your billing information at https://secure-verify.example.com/account within 24 hours. A refund of 49.99 is pending and will be released once verification is complete. For your security, this link expires today. If you have questions about this charge or your cash back balance, visit https://billing.example.com/help. Thank you for your prompt attention. Account Services Team

facadePattern: ISpamClassificationFacade → TransformerSpamClassificationFacade (singleton, trained once) | new FTTransformerNetwork<double>(NeuralNetworkArchitecture(custom layers: FeatureTokenizer(8→64) → PrependCLSToken → 2× TransformerEncoder(4 heads, ff 256) → SequenceTokenSlice(CLS) → Dense(2, softmax)), FTTransformerOptions<double>) → SetTrainingMode(true) → Train(x[100,8], y[100,2] one-hot) until loss ≤ 0.0005 (max 30 epochs, CategoricalCrossEntropyLoss) → SetTrainingMode(false) → Predict(Tensor[M,8]) → softmax [M,2] → P(spam)
